title: Lively Crispy Moroccan Chickpea Pudding
description: A pungent, crispy chickpea loaf packed with dried fruits inspired by Christmas pudding, topped with browned oil and panko for a crunchy finish.

ingredients.name: dried mixed fruits (raisins, sultanas, currants, candied orange peel)

instructions: Preheat oven to 180C and grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
In a large bowl, mash cooked chickpeas with a fork until almost smooth.
Stir in whole wheat flour, cumin, paprika, coriander, cinnamon, salt, and pepper until a thick batter forms.
Fold in dried fruits, chopped almonds, and panko breadcrumbs, then add lemon juice and olive oil, mixing until well combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan, smoothing the top with a spatula.
Bake for 35 minutes until the top is golden and a toothpick comes out clean.
While baking, melt 20ml of olive oil in a small pan over medium heat until it turns golden brown and fragrant.
Drizzle the browned oil over the freshly baked loaf and sprinkle with the remaining panko for extra crispness.
Allow the loaf to cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Slice into bars for meal prep; store in an airtight container for up to 5 days.
